body.title: Reorg execute — bucket archive moves (seed/migrate/cc_memory_seed/papers-history-archive)
body.result: Partial ship (commit c3d3a039): 33 of 99 files moved. migrate_*.py (13) → TheIgorsProject/migrations_archive/. papers/history/_archive/ (20) → TheIgorsProject/papers_history_archive/. Suite 4186/0/32skip. Pre-move grep blocked seed_layer3_/layer4_ (test importers), seed_goal_close_habit (test reads file), cc_memory_seed (installer dependency), other seeds (need per-file verification) — filed T-reorg-seed-cc-memory-archive-deferred (M) covering all 66 blocked files.
body.description:
Reorg § 4 #2/#5/#6/#7 — Akien-approved 2026-05-01: move 4 archive buckets from TheIgors/ → TheIgorsProject/ subdirs.

**Affected files:**
- lab/claudecode/seed_*.py (~80 files) → TheIgorsProject/seed_archive/
- lab/claudecode/migrate_*.py (13 files) → TheIgorsProject/migrations_archive/
- lab/claudecode/cc_memory_seed/ (43 files) → TheIgorsProject/20260427.Cleanup/auto_memory_archive/
- papers/history/_archive/ (1 dir) → TheIgorsProject/papers_history_archive/
- LEAVE: papers/history/*.csb.txt loose files (5 files — keep for next pass)

**Design rules:** archives → TheIgorsProject (rubric default per reorg-plan-2026-05-01-opus-pass.md)
**Scope boundary:** in — bulk file moves with git mv; verify no live referrer to moved paths (grep before move); update any palace/doc references; out — utility_closet/, cc_skills/ (separate ticket)
**Test plan:** pre-move grep for 'lab/claudecode/seed_', 'lab/claudecode/migrate_', 'cc_memory_seed' across wild_igor/+lab/+tests/; if hits → ticket those references first; pytest -x -q passes after moves; git log shows the renames
